title: Copy Activity or Email Logged to New Board as Item
excerpt: Hello, if someone on my team logs an activity on their clients file, I would like a copy of that activity to be added to a new board as an item for “Recent Activities” - how would I do this?

posts.author: SMSaprilsmith (April Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, if someone on my team logs an activity on their clients file, I would like a copy of that activity to be added to a new board as an item for “Recent Activities” - how would I do this?

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: Same question. Has anyone figured this out?
